valueCards.title: Industrial Refrigeration
valueCards.body: Ammonia, CO₂, and glycol systems for food processing, cold storage, and manufacturing. The "R" in HVACR is your competitive edge in the most technical segment of the industry.

valueCards.title: Mission-Critical Applications
valueCards.body: Data centers, pharmaceutical facilities, and temperature-controlled logistics demand precision cooling. hvacr.contact speaks directly to engineers and facility managers who build and maintain these environments.

valueCards.title: B2B Authority
valueCards.body: Instant credibility with contractors, engineers, equipment manufacturers, and private equity groups. The .contact TLD signals professional connection — perfect for an industry built on relationships and trust.

valueCards.title: Defensible Brand Asset
valueCards.body: Own the namespace that defines your entire category. Every industrial refrigeration firm, contractor directory, and equipment marketplace will be measured against the authority of hvacr.contact.

acquisitionTerms.label: Full ownership transfer
acquisitionTerms.detail: Domain pushed or transferred via your preferred registrar (Namecheap, GoDaddy, Cloudflare, etc.)

acquisitionTerms.label: Secure escrow available
acquisitionTerms.detail: Recommended: Escrow.com or DAN.com for buyer/seller protection

acquisitionTerms.label: Fast closing
acquisitionTerms.detail: Typical transfer completes in 1–5 business days once payment clears

acquisitionTerms.label: Flexible terms for qualified buyers
acquisitionTerms.detail: Payment plans or crypto options available upon request
